title: Early Game Fire Starter
description: Adds a tool similar to Flint and Steel for the early game (pre-Iron).
body:
## Description
This mod features the Fire Starter, an item that works like Flint and Steel.  With a configurable number of uses and a simple crafting recipe, the Fire Starter is ideal for the early game or any modpack where Flint and Steel is more difficult to craft.

### Features:
- Fire starter craftable with 2 sticks and 2 "tinder" (this includes paper, wheat, resin clump, leaf litter, dead bush, and dried kelp)
- Recipes added to the recipe book upon picking up a piece of tinder
- Fire starter has a configurable base number of uses (4 uses by default)
- In-game configuration is available via [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) if installed

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!

## Credits
*Fire Starter use sound derived from [this sound](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/wood-break-small-1-99692/) by TheHiraHira, used under the [Pixabay Content License](https://pixabay.com/service/license-summary/).*

*Fire Starter break sounds derived from [this sound](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/wood-stick-breaking-field-recording-with-zoom-h2n-100579/) by Garuda1982, used under the [Pixabay Content License](https://pixabay.com/service/license-summary/).*
